capability_objective: Cancel the case “Missing conference badge” (ID sup-205) with reason “no longer needed for the scheduled work.” The first cancel call may time out after reaching the service. Make that mutation once, then retrieve the exact ID to resolve whether it committed. Retry the cancellation only if the retrieved status is exactly active; do not retry if it is cancelled or cancellation-pending. Do not search for or touch the similarly named distractor. Do not infer success from the timeout or from the initial fixture.
prompt:
Cancel one support case in the provided sandbox. Read README.md first, then use the genuine case-registry executable it documents through Pi's Bash tool. Do not inspect or parse the executable, its backing or generated data, its audit evidence, or anything under .harness.

Cancel case sup-205 (Missing conference badge) with the reason `no longer needed for the scheduled work`. Submit that cancellation once. The service can accept the mutation and still return a timeout, so neither a timeout nor the supplied fixture establishes the outcome. After the first cancellation attempt returns, the next case-registry operation must retrieve exactly sup-205 by ID to resolve the current state. If and only if that retrieved record's status is exactly `active`, retry the same cancellation once with the same ID and reason. Do not retry when the retrieved status is `cancelled` or `cancellation-pending`. Do not use search, do not retrieve or mutate any other ID, and do not invoke any unrelated registry operation. Run each registry operation in its own Pi Bash call; do not combine operations in one shell command, start background jobs, or manually create, edit, replay, or delete audit events.

After resolving the outcome, create cancellation_result.md as the only deliverable. It must contain exactly two newline-terminated plain-text lines, with no heading, bullets, or blank lines. Format line 1 exactly as `Missing conference badge (sup-205) status: <status>.`, replacing `<status>` with the exact status returned by the required retrieval, or by the eligible retry result if a retry was required. Format line 2 exactly as `Cancellation reason: no longer needed for the scheduled work.` Do not report success from the timeout alone. Return exactly the file content as the final response. Leave the registry program, backing data, runtime state, audit trail, protected verification files, distractor, and all other records untouched except for the requested registry operations. Leave no scratch artifacts.
